html:
2026-0657
2026-06-22PS, EMCREmergency Management ActProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 291, SaskatchewanProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 291 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Saskatchewan with respect to the interface fires that occurred in Saskatchewan, from May to August 2025.N/A
subject: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 291, Saskatchewan
precis: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 291 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Saskatchewan with respect to the interface fires that occurred in Saskatchewan, from May to August 2025.
